Class DRChart

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRDimensionComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.component.DRHyperLinkComponent
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.DRChart
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIChart, DRIComponent, DRIDimensionComponent, DRIHyperLinkComponent, Serializable
public class DRChart extends DRHyperLinkComponent implements DRIChart

DRChart class.
